text: Being here awakens my curiosity. The space feels intentionally designed for contemplation and engagement. The glass and bright lights create an atmosphere of transparency and inquiry. Seeing the large 'R+D' (research and development) letters and the interactive displays, I sense an invitation to reflect on the intersection of innovation and human experience. I feel simultaneously inspired and a little alienated by the sterile, futurist quality—reminded of how new environments can both stimulate thought and make one question their role in the unfolding narrative of progress.
